prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to processing personal data in relation to official veterinary roles and related functions, which are applicable to England as they relate to the operations of the Animal and Plant Health Agency (APHA), an executive agency of the UK government that operates across England and provides services in compliance with UK laws including those affecting the welfare and health of animals.
